name: IPGeolocation
description: IPGeolocation provides IP-based geolocation, timezone, astronomy, and user-agent parsing APIs. Look up any IP address to get location, ISP, timezone, security threat assessment, and celestial data for any coordinates.

capabilities.name: ipgeo_lookup
capabilities.description: Look up the geographic location of an IP address or domain. Returns country, city, lat/lng, ISP, ASN, and timezone.

capabilities.name: ipgeo_bulk_lookup
capabilities.description: Look up geographic locations for up to 50,000 IP addresses in a single POST request.

capabilities.name: timezone_lookup
capabilities.description: Get current date, time, and timezone for a location by timezone name, IP, coordinates, or airport code.

capabilities.name: timezone_convert
capabilities.description: Convert time between two locations using timezone names, coordinates, or airport codes.

capabilities.name: astronomy_lookup
capabilities.description: Get sunrise/sunset, moonrise/moonset, moon phase, and solar position for a location and date.

capabilities.name: astronomy_time_series
capabilities.description: Get astronomy data for a date range (max 90 days) at a given location.

capabilities.name: useragent_parse
capabilities.description: Parse a user-agent string from the request header to extract browser, device, and OS details.

capabilities.name: useragent_parse_custom
capabilities.description: Parse a custom user-agent string sent in the request body.

capabilities.name: useragent_bulk_parse
capabilities.description: Parse up to 50,000 user-agent strings in a single request.
